Python fStrings is a method in Python Which helps you to place variables in strings very conveniently Let's go to the computer screen and see how fStrings is made And we get to see this Python 3.6 version in Python Such a great feature of Python Let's see it Let's get started Intro The first thing I want to tell you about fString is that It is used for string formatting fString actually solved a problem Which was in Python programming Python programmers were facing And that was the problem while formatting a string Now I will tell you what is string formatting Suppose I have written here letter is equal to And I made a string here And I write here, Hey my name is And after this I put brackets like this And after doing this I write something like this And I am very Or else, and I am from And after that I write something like this Now suppose what happens is Country Country Is equal to, I write India And with that I write name is equal to Harry So I can do something like this I can say letter.format And format is a method, a string method And I can say name and country So if I do something like this Then the value of name will go in this bracket And the value of country will go in that bracket In total what will happen is If I print this I print this, print letter.format So what will happen is I will get my name is Harry And I am from India As you can see here So what did it do, format method Put the name here and put the country here Now suppose something like this happens That I would have given something like this Country name Then what would have happened, it would
